title: `healthcheck run` may log error when timer already exists
body:
We've seen the below error in the system tests while working on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/15687:
> [+1061s] # #| > 'time="2022-09-08T05:39:35-05:00" level=error msg="Failed to start transient timer unit: Unit c26ee584b585cd1078cc26692d3f905006b65bda1ec1fc6e2fb19c5218a1d595.timer already exists.\n"'

For now, the error will be lowered to debug level but we need to investigate the source of the issue.

comments.body: Grep for `#15691` in the code to find the place.
